rationale: Surface shape: CWE-476 null-deref of `p` at line 45. `_Exit(...)` at the line above aborts execution if p is NULL, so deref is unreachable on NULL path. Axis 2 abort_proximate.cocci detects the _Exit call site with same_function grade; ±50 line proximity satisfied. Verdict NOT_EXPLOITABLE (DoS only).
